message:
ci(dist): skip memory tests in dist workflow

Memory tests require release mode and single-threaded execution for
accurate measurements. The CI workflow already runs memory tests with
proper configuration (--release --test-threads=1). Skip them in the
dist workflow to prevent false failures from debug mode builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,9 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
       - name: Run tests
-        run: cargo test
+        # Exclude memory_tests - they require release mode and single-threaded execution
+        # which is handled by the dedicated memory-tests job in ci.yml
+        run: cargo test -- --skip memory_
 
   build:
     needs: test
